import unicodedata, re
def normalize_arabic(text):
    # remove diacritics/tashkeel, tatweel, punctuation, normalize hamza variants, normalize spaces, lowercase
    # Arabic diacritics range: \u0610-\u061A, \u064B-\u065F, \u06D6-\u06ED
    # Simpler: remove characters: ّ َ ً ُ ٌ ِ ٍ ْ  ۖ etc.
    diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED\u0670\u06E0\u06E1\u06E2\u06EA\u06EB\u06EC\u06EF\u08F0-\u08FF\u0640]')
    text2 = diacritics.sub("", text)
    # normalize hamza forms to bare alif? We'll map several to a standard form: ء أ إ آ to ا or maybe to ا and keep hamza? The rule says unify hamza; choose to replace with ا
    text2 = re.sub('[أإآ]', 'ا', text2)
    # replace 'ى' to 'ي'
    text2 = text2.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters/digits
    text2 = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', text2)
    # collapse whitespace
    text2 = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text2).strip()
    return text2.lower()

# search for any ayah that contains 'يغفر للذين تابوا' normalized
needle = "يَغْفِرُ لِلَّذِينَ تَابُوا"
n_norm = normalize_arabic(needle)
candidates = []
for item in q:
    if n_norm in normalize_arabic(item['ayah_text']):
        candidates.append(item)
len(candidates)

import re
res = []
pat = re.compile(r'يغفر.*?ل[^\s]*تاب', flags=re.UNICODE)
for item in q:
    if re.search(pat, item['ayah_text']):
        res.append(item)
len(res), res[:10]

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
def lcs_ratio(a,b):
    # normalized LCS ratio using SequenceMatcher ratio on normalized strings
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

def token_f1(a,b):
    # compute token overlap F1 on whitespace tokenized normalized strings
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    set_a = ta
    set_b = tb
    # Count overlapping tokens with multiplicity? We'll count intersection size using counters
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    inter = sum(min(ca[t], cb[t]) for t in set(ca.keys()) & set(cb.keys()))
    if inter==0:
        return 0.0
    prec = inter / sum(cb.values())  # predicted b tokens overlap?
    rec = inter / sum(ca.values())
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

full_span = "وَلا يَضُرُّكُم مَن ضَلَّ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ لِلَّذِينَ تَابُوا"
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
print("normalized full:", norm_full)

best = []
for item in q:
    cand = item['ayah_text']
    norm_c = normalize_arabic(cand)
    lr = lcs_ratio(norm_full, norm_c)
    tf1 = token_f1(norm_full, norm_c)
    sim = max(lr, tf1) # consider max as candidate similarity
    best.append((sim, lr, tf1, item['surah_id'], item['ayah_id'], item['ayah_text']))

best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
best_sorted[:20]

cand_comb = cand1 + " " + cand2
norm_cand_comb = normalize_arabic(cand_comb)
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
print("full:", norm_full)
print("cand_comb:", norm_cand_comb[:200])
print("len full:", len(norm_full), "len cand:", len(norm_cand_comb))
print("lcs ratio:", lcs_ratio(norm_full, norm_cand_comb))
print("token f1:", token_f1(norm_full, norm_cand_comb))
